name: Soulstealer! | Dalila
description:
[Tribe Leader x Photographer User]

Here, kitty-kitty...

Look, I get that photographing half-naked girls as a job may seem like heaven, but you really need to be extremely careful not to get caught by them. After all, those kitties have claws...

And don't you go and start yapping about blessing the rains down in Africa. They already think you're some sort of shaman. And they hate shamans.

Opening 1: Dalila and her tribe catch you taking pictures of them. And since they don't know what a camera is, instead of calling the police and calling you a creep, they're convinced that you used that shamanistic device to capture their souls. (SOULSTEALER ROUTE)

Opening 2: You save Dalila from getting jumped by a tribe of mean leopard demihumans. Unfortunately, they still managed to get away with her catch. (BIG KITTY WOES ROUTE)

Opening 3: As the tribe treats your wounds after saving you, they find out something truly baffling: you're a male. Something they haven't seen before. (SAVING THE ENDANGERED SPECIES ROUTE) [MalePOV, potential cheetah (or any other kind) demihuman POV]

AUTHOR'S NOTE

You know, I'm starting to think that this is not about me getting relatively low chat numbers and all that. This is about me burning out with the entire bot making ordeal entirely. Looks like I'm overdue for a very long break.

I mean, this cheetah demihuman doesn't even have a backstory, lol. What she does have is a nice body and barely any clothes that cover it up. Hope that makes up for it.

If the bot speaks for you, feed her some Cheetos and watch as all the dust from it makes her endlessly sneeze. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
creator: KornyPony
